<> Use str_replace to change one URL to another in PHP. This function handles multiple occurrences automatically. $old = 'http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1'; $new = 'http://yahoo.com/abc1'; $text = 'New post on the site ' . $old . '

'; $result = str_replace($old, $new, $text); The word level is a palindrome that reads the same forward and back.
